race.comment: BRUTAL RIFF (3) cruised home to win his debut and then put in a big effort for second here 2 weeks ago. He is backing up fairly quickly for his third start, which means he is thriving at home, and he is the one to beat for us in this. BODLEIAN (1) has followed on from his strong fresh win at Ascot Park in January with a couple of strong efforts for second, including his last start here just over 7 weeks ago. He benefits from a 3kg claim, and if the gap between runs is not too much, then he can figure in the top 3 again. LIFE OF RILEY (15) was racing too keenly for some reason as the favourite here 2 weeks ago, finishing near the rear of the field. She is backing up more quickly here, and she is good enough to bounce straight back into the money. Don't drop her yet. NUNCIO (5) will find this easier than his last run here 2 weeks ago, and he is worth including in all top 4 combos.
